transcript_quality: partial — Granola meeting summary available; full transcript unavailable
address: 3-bed house, Huddersfield, HD (exact postcode not captured)
lead_profile_text: STL Switch — Second Home / Personal Use. 3-bed house, Huddersfield. Completely unfurnished but move-in ready: new kitchen, decent carpets and decoration, small tidy rear garden needing outdoor furniture. Sleeps 6 without sofa bed. Property currently vacant. Julia's goal: rental income while retaining ~1 week/month personal use throughout winter (6 months) plus occasional summer days. Income target ~£15,000/year net — equivalent to a traditional long-let. Mortgage position unconfirmed.
emotional_profile: Pragmatic and income-focused but motivated by personal use control. Not a yield-maximiser — wants to match LTL equivalent while retaining calendar access. Conservative £15k target already comfortably exceeded by £20,500 net projection.
delay_timeline: Follow-up call 22 May 2026; wants to launch June 2026 to catch peak season
green_light_trigger_phrases: June would be ideal to get started

top_objections.text: How does personal use blocking work in practice?
top_objections.zac_response: Calendar control via Stayful calendar and Slack; dates blocked in advance; cleaning costs apply to personal use turnovers

top_objections.zac_response: Competitive market acknowledged; comparable properties averaging 4.7–4.8 ratings across 138+ reviews; year 1 ramp-up expected

top_objections.zac_response: Furnishing/setup quote to be sent by Zac after the meeting

top_objections.zac_response: Maintenance coordination fully handled by Stayful

top_questions.text: What day-to-day management does Julia remain responsible for?
top_questions.answer: Guest communication, dynamic pricing, maintenance coordination, cleaning, and multi-platform listing all handled by Stayful; Julia retains calendar control only

top_questions.text: How does personal use blocking work?
top_questions.answer: Dates blocked via Stayful calendar and Slack; recommend avoiding June, July, August (peak); recommended personal use months: February, November, January

Dedicated Slack channel and monthly statement process gave practical confidence
Pets welcome and flexible cancellation noted positively (revenue boosters)
